source_name: Wikipedia — List of books banned by governments (Indonesia section)
_note: Wikipedia's Indonesia section is sparse (4 entries; 2 already in DB; 1 categorical 'All Chinese literature 1967' that doesn't fit our book-row model). This batch imports only Interest by Kevin Gaughen. Perplexity overlay is required to substantively expand ID coverage (currently 9 bans for a country with enormous Suharto-era ban history).

entries.title: Interest
entries.author: Kevin Gaughen
entries.description: Banned by the government of Indonesia in 2015 for subversive and/or anti-government themes.
